title: Lucid Announces Q3 Production & Deliveries, Sets Date for Third Quarter 2025 Results
text: Lucid announced Q3 2025 production and delivery figures ahead of formal earnings results. The company reported increased production and deliveries as the Gravity SUV ramp continued. Deliveries showed strong sequential growth, demonstrating improving operational execution. However, the company reduced its full-year guidance, reflecting market demand softness and operational challenges. The guidance cut represented a warning sign for investors about the strength of EV market demand and Lucid's ability to scale profitably. Management highlighted cost reduction initiatives and efficiency improvements in the Arizona facility. The Q3 earnings announcement was scheduled for early November, with markets bracing for continued challenges despite production progress.
